Rough drawing fill parameters

Source: R/roxygen-docs.R
mypaintr-rough-fill.Rd

Rough drawing fill parameters

Arguments

col

Fill colour. When visible and fill_pattern is NULL, a solid fill is drawn.

border

Border colour.

fill_pattern

Optional fill pattern created with hatch(), crosshatch(), zigzag(), or jumble().

Developed by David Hugh-Jones.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
